text.tspan: ABSOLUTE CARNAGE
@liuzhen9320 upgrades five GitHub Actions in a single week, keeping CI fresh and future‑proof
NOT A DRILL
@liuzhen9320 merges six dependency updates to bird‑lg‑rs, silencing version‑drift warnings
EXPERTS BAFFLED
@liuzhen9320 reviews no PRs but still manages to bump dependencies across the board
DEVELOPING
@liuzhen9320 spikes with seven commits on Tuesday, then settles into a steady drip
UNPRECEDENTED
@liuzhen9320 updates Docker Actions to the latest releases, ensuring smooth container builds
KEYBOARD ON FIRE
@liuzhen9320 pushes commits at a frantic pace, averaging two per day this week
